title: Beginner 3-day strength
summary: Three full-body sessions for a beginner with manageable session length.
prompt: Build me a 3-day beginner gym program focused on general strength and muscle gain. Keep each session under 60 minutes, use common machines and free weights, and include a short warmup for each training day.

title: Joint-friendly fat loss
summary: Low-impact training with strength work and conditioning support.
prompt: I want a gym program for fat loss and general fitness that is gentle on my joints. Include low-impact cardio or mobility where helpful, avoid aggressive plyometrics, and keep the training realistic for someone returning after a break.

title: Home workout
prompt: Create a home workout program using bodyweight, bands, and dumbbells. I want to improve strength, posture, and consistency with sessions around 35 to 45 minutes.

title: Golf support 60+
summary: Strength, mobility, and balance for an older adult who plays golf.
prompt: Design a conservative program for an adult over 60 who wants better strength, mobility, and balance to support golf. Use joint-friendly exercises, include mobility warmups, and avoid risky or highly technical lifts.

title: Upper/lower muscle gain
summary: Four-day split for hypertrophy with moderate volume.
prompt: Build a 4-day upper/lower gym program for muscle gain. Use a mix of machines and free weights, keep overhead work moderate, and include clear exercise variety without making sessions too long.
